title: kaempferia minuta
intro: Kaempferia minuta, also known as Thai ginger or Krachai Dam, is a plant species belonging to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae) and is native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Kaempferia minuta include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in weight loss. Herbal preparations of Kaempferia minuta include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
